title: TeTo totem
description: 该材质包将游戏中的不死图腾改为重音主题样式，采用其标志性蓝绿色调This texture pack changes the in-game undead totem to a Hatsune TeTo-themed style, using her signature color scheme.
body: ![teto](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2b3b2d805bbb0efc858622ddfaf6087f946bc97_0.webp)该材质包将游戏中的不死图腾改为重音主题样式，采用其标志性色调This texture pack changes the in-game undead totem to a Hatsune TeTo-themed style, using her signature color scheme.
